title: Create: Extra Recipes
description: Introduces new processing recipes designed to integrate smoothly with Create automation.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c35900ac7df1829227b6299f3b591e19b8a715.png) ## _Description_ A lightweight mod that expands crafting possibilities for **Vanilla Minecraft** and improves integration with the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) ecosystem. This mod introduces **new crafting recipes, progression tweaks, and automation-friendly mechanics**, while staying faithful to the vanilla gameplay experience. The goal is simple: make items **more accessible, more logical, and automation-friendly**. ## ✨ _Vanilla Tweaks_ Several vanilla recipes have been adjusted or added to improve progression and accessibility. ### 🔁 Recipe Improvements - Comparators and Repeaters can now be crafted using other stone variants instead of only regular stone. - Raw Ore Blocks can be smelted directly to obtain their corresponding metal blocks. - Smithing Templates are now cheaper to duplicate. ![Smithing Template Cheaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3418ee482a6d6fda72a98437f252eb760bbcf7d6.png) ### 🧰 New Craftable Items Several previously uncraftable items now have recipes. Examples include: - Nautilus Shell - Horse Armor - Trial Keys - **Various rare or exploration-based items** ![Trial Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54ea6cd44c56b4275b875a766f186e4a390ded4.png) ## ⚙️ _Create Integration_ This mod also adds several crafting and processing options designed to work naturally with **Create automation systems**. ### 🧱 Craftable Materials - Asurine - Crimsite - Ochrum - Veridium - **And many more items !**
## 🏭 _Automation Recipes_ Several new **Create-compatible processing chains** have been introduced. These recipes allow certain rare resources to be obtained through factory automation. Examples include: - Processing Nether materials - Alternative Diamond production - Additional crushing and processing recipes
## 🟧 _Copper Oxidation_ Copper blocks can now **oxidize using water**, allowing easier automation of the copper aging stages. Perfect for builders who use **oxidized copper palettes**. ## 🔧 _Compatibility_ This mod supports both **NeoForge** and **Fabric**. **NeoForge**: - Easy Smithing Templates - Supplementaries - More Armor Trims - Alex's Cave * **Fabric**: - Works standalone (no compatibility, as the above mods are not available on Fabric) ## 💡 _Future Plans_ Possible future additions: - More Create automation chains - Additional vanilla recipe improvements - Better resource loops for factories - Backport 1.20.1 for Forge and Neoforge ## 🧩 _Modpacks_ You are free to include this mod in modpacks. # **Check out my other mods and texture pack !** [![create-templates-gears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubfQJZV7/images/5b7682b5f373f2dfd90561cda9c96f642bec0990.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-templates-gears) [![create-melodies-mechanisms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DR43yPHa/images/801a9e736afb0087062434a8eac5ebd6ba828682.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-melodies-mechanisms) [![colorcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eEFJhRYv/images/2e31d7a074cbb34170d974221063c4390b9332a8.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/textcolorcraft) [![ascendedalloys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6kjnAD62/images/7db9639b95699eb2128fb817f8fc8b501e8367b4.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascendedalloys)
